title: Bridge Essay: Neural bases of the bodily self as revealed by electrical brain stimulation: A s

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Birth/Body** (Phase 1) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Birth/Body to mechanistic neuroscience through Neural, bases, of, the, bodily.

**Neural bases of the bodily self as revealed by electrical brain stimulation: Asystematic review.** — Hum Brain Mapp. PMID: 36852645. DOI: 10.1002/hbm.26253. An increasing amount of recent research has focused on the multisensory and neural bases of the bodily self. This pre-reflective form of self is considered as multifaceted, incorporating phenomenal components, such as self location, body ownership, first-person perspective, agency, and the perceptual body image.
